<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='512' height='512' viewBox='0 0 512 512'>
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id='bg' cx='50%' cy='35%'>
      <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#0b2340'/>
      <stop offset='60%' stop-color='#071426'/>
      <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#000000'/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id='planet' cx='35%' cy='35%'>
      <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#ffdca8'/>
      <stop offset='50%' stop-color='#e0b37a'/>
      <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#a56f3e'/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id='ring' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='0%'>
      <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#b78a4d'/>
      <stop offset='50%' stop-color='#d6b07a'/>
      <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#8f6231'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id='planetClip'>
      <circle cx='256' cy='256' r='110'/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(#bg)'/>

  <!-- ring (behind the planet) -->
  <g transform='rotate(-22 256 256)'>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='256' rx='230' ry='90' fill='none' stroke='url(#ring)' stroke-width='56' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' opacity='0.85'/>
  </g>

  <!-- planet body -->
  <circle cx='256' cy='256' r='110' fill='url(#planet)'/>

  <!-- subtle banding on the planet (clipped) -->
  <g clip-path='url(#planetClip)' opacity='0.6' transform='rotate(-10 256 256)'>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='256' rx='140' ry='40' fill='#000' opacity='0.05'/>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='242' rx='140' ry='28' fill='#000' opacity='0.04'/>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='270' rx='120' ry='20' fill='#000' opacity='0.03'/>
  </g>

  <!-- front portion of the ring to cross in front of the planet -->
  <g transform='rotate(-22 256 256)'>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='256' rx='230' ry='90' fill='none' stroke='#f5e6c8' stroke-width='16' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' opacity='0.95'/>
  </g>

  <!-- soft shadow on lower side of ring for depth -->
  <g transform='rotate(-22 256 256)' opacity='0.35'>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='304' rx='230' ry='90' fill='none' stroke='#000000' stroke-width='30' />
  </g>
</svg>
